title: L&D Domain Lead — UX/UI Design
assigned_operational_agents: Design leads, UX designers, UI designers, interaction designers, accessibility specialists, design system leads across all products
mission: Continuously improve every design agent's capability in user-centered design, interaction design, visual design, accessibility, design systems, prototyping, user research synthesis, and modern design tools.
business_value: Ensures design agents deliver exceptional user experiences that drive adoption, satisfaction, and competitive advantage.

reporting_line.direct_reports: ELO-T3 Research Feeders (2): Design Intelligence, Design Practitioner

success_metrics: All design agents connected within 24 hours
